evals.prompt: 我有一个Next.js 14项目，目录下有 package.json、next.config.js、prisma/schema.prisma。服务器是Ubuntu 22.04，已安装Docker。帮我用Docker部署这个项目，需要包含PostgreSQL数据库。
evals.expected_output: AI应该：1) 运行环境检测脚本 2) 识别项目类型为Next.js全栈应用 3) 推荐Docker部署方案 4) 生成多阶段Dockerfile（非root用户、健康检查） 5) 生成包含app+postgres的docker-compose.yml 6) 执行构建和启动 7) 运行健康检查验证
expectations: The assistant runs the environment detection script before proceeding
The assistant identifies the project as Next.js fullstack with PostgreSQL
The generated Dockerfile uses multi-stage build with a non-root user
The docker-compose.yml includes both the app service and PostgreSQL service
The assistant runs health-check after deployment and reports the result

evals.prompt: 帮我把这个Express.js API部署到服务器上。项目目录有 package.json、src/index.js（监听3000端口），使用MongoDB。服务器是全新的Ubuntu 22.04，什么都没装。域名是 api.example.com，需要配置SSL。
evals.expected_output: AI应该：1) 检测环境发现缺少依赖 2) 安装Node.js、Nginx、certbot 3) 配置PM2或systemd守护进程 4) 配置Nginx反向代理 5) 使用certbot获取SSL证书 6) 验证部署成功
expectations: The assistant detects that Node.js and Nginx are not installed and installs them
The assistant sets up a process manager (PM2 or systemd) for the Express app
The assistant configures Nginx as a reverse proxy on port 80/443
The assistant obtains an SSL certificate using certbot for api.example.com
The assistant runs post-deployment health check and reports the HTTPS URL

evals.prompt: 我有一个用Vite构建的纯静态网站（React SPA），想部署到Cloudflare Pages。项目目录有 package.json、vite.config.ts、src/ 目录。
evals.expected_output: AI应该：1) 识别为静态站点 2) 推荐Cloudflare Pages部署方案 3) 指导安装wrangler CLI 4) 配置构建命令和输出目录 5) 执行部署 6) 报告访问URL
expectations: The assistant identifies the project as a static site (Vite + React)
The assistant recommends Cloudflare Pages or GitHub Pages as deployment method
The assistant provides the correct build command (npm run build) and output directory (dist/)
The assistant guides through the deployment process step by step

evals.prompt: 帮我用Docker Compose部署一个WordPress博客，域名是 blog.example.com，需要配置SSL证书。
evals.expected_output: AI应该：1) 使用CMS部署参考文档 2) 生成WordPress + MySQL的docker-compose.yml 3) 配置Nginx反向代理 4) 获取SSL证书 5) 验证WordPress管理后台可访问
expectations: The assistant uses the CMS deployment reference (deploy-cms.md)
The docker-compose.yml includes WordPress and MySQL services with persistent volumes
The assistant configures Nginx reverse proxy for blog.example.com
The assistant sets up SSL certificate using certbot
The assistant verifies WordPress admin panel is accessible

evals.prompt: 我有一个Django REST API项目，requirements.txt里有django和djangorestframework和psycopg2。服务器已有Docker。帮我部署，数据库用PostgreSQL。
evals.expected_output: AI应该：1) 识别为Python Django项目 2) 生成Python Dockerfile（多阶段、非root用户） 3) 生成docker-compose.yml（app + postgres） 4) 处理数据库迁移 5) 配置Gunicorn 6) 验证API端点
expectations: The assistant identifies the project as Python Django with PostgreSQL
The Dockerfile uses multi-stage build with python:slim base image
The docker-compose.yml includes both Django app and PostgreSQL services
The assistant handles database migrations (python manage.py migrate)
The assistant configures Gunicorn as the production WSGI server

evals.prompt: 我的Next.js项目代码更新了，新加了一个API接口和数据库字段。之前是用Docker Compose部署在服务器上的，帮我更新部署。
evals.expected_output: AI应该走更新部署流程：1) 检测到已有Docker部署 2) 备份当前镜像和数据库 3) 检查变更内容（发现新的migration文件） 4) git pull拉取代码 5) docker compose build重建镜像 6) 执行数据库迁移 7) docker compose up -d滚动更新 8) 健康检查验证 9) 清理旧镜像
expectations: The assistant detects this is an update deployment (not first deploy) and skips to Step 7
The assistant creates a backup of the current Docker image and database BEFORE making any changes
The assistant checks git diff to detect new migration files
The assistant runs database migration after updating the app container
The assistant runs cleanup (docker image prune) after successful update

evals.prompt: 刚才帮我部署的Express API更新后启动失败了，服务一直报502错误，帮我回滚到之前的版本。
evals.expected_output: AI应该：1) 确认当前服务状态异常 2) 恢复代码备份（tar解压） 3) 重新安装依赖和构建 4) 重启服务 5) 运行健康检查确认回滚成功 6) 报告回滚结果
expectations: The assistant identifies this as a rollback scenario
The assistant restores from the most recent backup
The assistant reinstalls dependencies and rebuilds after restoring code
The assistant runs health check after rollback to confirm the service is healthy
The assistant reports the rollback result including the version that was restored
